name: Khaitan (India) Limited
summary: Khaitan (India) Limited manufactures and trades in sugar in India. The company operates through Marketing, Sugar, and Agriculture divisions. The company also trades in electrical products, fans, appliances, wires, cables and pumps, lighting products, etc.; and cultivates sugarcane. It offers its products under the Khaitan brand. The company was formerly known as Khaitan Agro Complex Limited and changed its name to Khaitan (India) Limited in 1994. Khaitan (India) Limited was incorporated in 1936 and is based in Kolkata, India.
